message.content:
The image you provided does not show a chess interface with 3D styling, pieces, or a board. Instead, it displays a **Vercel deployment success page** (a web hosting platform) with a "Congratulations!" message confirming a project deployment. The central visual is a preview of a project named "Шахматы" (Chess in Russian), but this preview is a 2D UI mockup (not a 3D chess interface) showing menu options, buttons, and color swatches—no chess pieces, board, or 3D effects are visible.  

### Key Details of the Image:  
- **Content**: A Vercel deployment confirmation page with a project preview (labeled "Шахматы") showing a 2D menu interface (dark blue background, buttons, text, and color palette).  
- **No Chess Interface Elements**: There are no chess pieces, board, or 3D styling (shadows, reflections, perspective) related to chess in this image.  


If you intended to share a chess interface, please re-upload the correct image, and I can provide a detailed description of its 3D style, piece design, board appearance, and visual effects!
